response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack and polyglot experience but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), far short of the 5-10 years required. No Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience demonstrated, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web/GIS/martech domains.
strengths: Strong general software craftsmanship with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Polyglot experience across multiple languages and platforms
Excellent written communication evidenced by talks and workshops
concerns: Only ~7 months of C++ experience, well below the 5-10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development background

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform experience
